title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · Threat Case: Metadata Budget
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext metadata budget increment in a progressively disclosed skill package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep metadata discriminative within shared context budgets.
Measure missed triggers, false triggers, and competing-skill selection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
